## Investment View
UNP scores 77/100 as a constructive_bullish setup. The score is driven mainly by the technical breakout picture and ENTRY_READY status, with 7 constructive versus 0 adverse stock-specific signals and a market overlay impact of 0 supportive versus 5 adverse effects.

- Thesis: The setup is actionable only while the breakout level continues to hold and recent constructive signals, including the broader market overlay when relevant, keep getting follow-through.
